# mrclean test fixture — synthetic value derived from a .env file
# Source: Layer 3 (.env value extraction) — this fixture's text contains the VALUE (not the name)
#         from a side-by-side .env file: MY_API_KEY=secretvalue12345
# Checksum-flip: N/A — this is the exact value loaded by dotenv.parse() and added to the blocklist
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential

Please send the request with the credential secretvalue12345 in the Authorization header.
